examples: His works show an uncreative imagination.
They make the same mistakes, so uncreative.
The mob psychology is uncreative; it lives a life of drag, it knows no dance, no song, no joy; it is mechanical.
They have simply chosen not to be part of the uncreative world that surrounds them.
Delegates claimed that its emphasis on core knowledge was a throw-back to rote learning and uncreative lists of facts.
